payload.label: table
payload.long_description: Front portion of a rectangular island-style table: light tan patterned laminate or tiled top with a speckled rounded edge trim sitting on a dark brown wooden cabinet base with a vertical center seam and an electrical outlet on the right; red-green decorative object visible on top. The object is partially cropped at left and right edges and appears roughly 1.0 m from the camera.
